series_metadata.series_description: Mandatory Pooling application documents: hearing sign-in sheets and opening remarks for the hearings.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 2 years after an Order is issued on the application or a pending application is withdrawn. ; Paper: 2 years after an Order is issued on the application or a pending application is withdrawn. If records are scanned into an electronic format, the paper copy may be recycled at that time., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
